title: selago tenuis
intro: Selago tenuis, also known as Blue Fountain or Blue Fountains, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa, characterized by its blue, bell-shaped flowers and upright growth habit. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Selago tenuis include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and improving respiratory function. Selago tenuis can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or as a tincture by mixing the plant material with a solvent, such as ethanol or glycerin, to create a concentrated extract.
